pending.title: Check Your Inbox
pending.body: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to secure your spot on the waitlist.
pending.spamHint: Don't see it? Check your spam or junk folder.

confirmed.title: You're on the Waitlist!
confirmed.body: We'll notify you as soon as Greeklish launches. Thanks for your interest!

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.body: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used. If you haven't confirmed yet, try signing up again.
